title: Stardom's Additions
description: A comprehensive Minecraft mod adding various features.
body:
![headerimage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6753eac64a1ac478091d1d3d8b477931e1517090.png)
# Stardom's Additions
A comprehensive content mod that expands Minecraft with new blocks, entities, tools, and gameplay mechanics across all three dimensions.

Vanilla Overhauls
- Fletching Table
  - Now fully functional with a custom GUI. Craft upgraded arrows by combining nuggets with standard arrows. Features include:

    - Input slots for nuggets and up to 3 arrows
    - Automatic recipe detection
    - Custom slot textures for intuitive crafting

New Blocks
- Block Families
  - Adds polished variants, bricks, walls, slabs, and stairs for:

  - Calcite, Amethyst, Netherrack, Obsidian, Crying Obsidian, Ice, and Snow
    
- Drying Rack
  - A functional block for converting items over time:
    - Rotten Flesh → Leather
    - Kelp → Dried Kelp
    - Milk Bucket → Cheese
    - Ghast Tear → Dried Ghast
    - Chorus Fruit → Popped Chorus Fruit
    - Mushroom color swapping
    - Takes 1 minute (1200 ticks) to process
    - Right-click to insert/retrieve items
    - Renders stored items
  
- Placer
  - Similar to a dispenser but places blocks instead of dropping items. Activates with redstone signals.
- Autumn Oak Leaves
  - Three color variants (red, orange, yellow) with custom-colored particle effects.
- Custom Creeper Heads
  - Decorative heads for Nether and End Creepers. Can be worn as helmets or placed with rotation.
New Entities
  
- Nether Creeper

  - Spawns in the Nether
  - Explosion power: 6.0 (double vanilla)
  - Standard movement speed

- End Creeper

  - Spawns in the End
  - Explosion power: 9.0 (three times vanilla)
  - Slower movement speed (0.25)

- Baby Creeper

  - Spawns in the Overworld
  - Explosion power: 1.5 (half vanilla)
  - Faster movement speed and longer fuse time (50 ticks)
  - Smaller hitbox (0.3×0.85)

New Items
  - Tiered Arrows
    - Progressive damage upgrades crafted at the fletching table:

      - Copper Arrow (Tier 1)
      - Iron Arrow (Tier 2)
      - Gold Arrow (Tier 0 - baseline)
      - Diamond Arrow (Tier 3)
      - Emerald Arrow (Tier 4)
      - Netherite Arrow (Tier 5) - fireproof
      - Explosive Arrow - creates explosions on impact

  - Drills
    - Mining tools that break 3 blocks vertically (center, above, below):

    - Available in all vanilla tool tiers plus Emerald
    - Respects Fortune, Silk Touch, and Unbreaking enchantments
    - Proper durability consumption
    - Sneak to disable multi-block breaking

  - Emerald Equipment
    - Full tool and armor set with Diamond-tier stats:

      - Durability: 1450 (tools) / Base 15 (armor)
      - Efficiency: 12.5
      - Enchantability: 12
      - Protection values match Diamond armor

- Food Items

  - Cheese - crafted by drying milk buckets
  - Ice Cream - 6 hunger, 12 saturation
  - Cupcake - 2 hunger, 0.4 saturation

- Ashen Bone
  - A bone that replaces the bone drop for Wither Skeletons

- Ashen Bone Meal
  - Reverse bone meal mechanics:

  - Grass/Mycelium → Ashen Dirt
  - Saplings/Azaleas → Dead Bush
  - Also untames wolves (applying Wither effect)

- Horse Armor
  - Adds Netherite and Emerald variants.

- Nuggets
  - Diamond, Emerald, and Netherite nuggets for crafting recipes.

- Special Features
  - "jeb_" Rainbow Effect
    - Naming any mob (except sheep) "jeb_" applies the rainbow color cycling effect.

  - Visual Status Effects
    - Frozen entities render with blue tint
    - Burning entities render with orange tint

- Easter Egg
  - Opening chests has a 1 in 100,000 chance to spawn a Wither.

- World Generation
  - Biomes

  - Autumnal Forest - replaces some Forest biomes, features autumn-colored oak leaves
  - Mushroom Caves - underground biome with mycelium surface and mushrooms

- Mob Spawning
  - Custom creeper variants spawn naturally in their respective dimensions with balanced spawn weights.
- Potions
  - Potion of Decay
    - Applies Wither effect for 3 minutes (3600 ticks).
    - Brewed by mixing an Awkward Potion with an Ashen Bone
